title: modiolastrum malvifolium
intro: Modiolastrum malvifolium is a plant species, commonly known as the 'white cockle', which belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Modiolastrum malvifolium include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
